form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished 5th in a Grade 6 on April 7 over 390m at Q Lakeside behind Hard Style Wife beaten 4 lengths (22.56). Looks well placed and should prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished 5th in a Grade 6 on April 7 over 390m at Q Lakeside behind Hard Style Wife beaten 4 lengths (22.56). Looks well placed and should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a 6 length third (17.84) over 300m at this track. Boxed on well at the latest run to hit the frame. Leading player.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a 6 length third (17.84) over 300m at this track. Boxed on well at the latest run to hit the frame. Leading player.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Was bumped heavily and became unbalanced in the back straight.
Heels galloped on rounding the first turn.

form.formComment: Finished third last start (18.06) over 300m at this track. Has a low draw. Must be included.

form.formComment: At the last start finished 4th on March 28 over 272m at The Gardens behind Magic Silver beaten 4 lengths (16.40) in a Grade 5. Has ability and can run well.

form.formComment: Ended last campaign with a fourth (17.95) in a GR 5 at this track and returns after a 11 weeks break. Others make more appeal.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off the heels in the back straight and lost ground.

form.formComment: Well supported last time and ran up to expectations, burning early to score a 3 length win at this track over 300m in 17.62. Can win again.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage seventh last time out over 300m at this track. Needs to find a bit more to test these.
